timeline.title: First Date
timeline.description: Our first official date was filled with laughter, deep conversations, and the undeniable feeling that we had found something special. That evening, we both knew this was the start of something beautiful.

timeline.title: Meeting the Families
timeline.description: We introduced each other to our families, and it was clear that everyone could see what we saw in each other. The love and acceptance we received made our bond even stronger.

timeline.title: The Proposal
timeline.description: On a beautiful spring day, Michael got down on one knee and asked the most important question of our lives. The answer was an immediate and joyful 'Yes!'
